name: GH_SliderInputMode
summary: Enumerates all possible slider text input modes.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Text input mode is not available.

enum_values.name: OnKeyDown
enum_values.summary: Text input mode will be available on keydown.

enum_values.name: OnDoubleClick
enum_values.summary: Text input mode will be available upon double click.

enum_values.name: All
enum_values.summary: All text input modes will be available.
